response.justification: Exceptional full-stack engineer with 18+ years of experience, far exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Currently works on AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq—a direct match to the job's AI agent development requirement. Demonstrates deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS (CDK), Docker, and Kubernetes across multiple senior/staff roles. Primary gaps are lack of explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, Playwright, and PostgreSQL—though extensive testing philosophy and Node.js background suggest these are quickly learnable rather than fundamental gaps.
strengths: Current role directly involves AI agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks—exact match to stated job requirement
18+ years of full-stack development with proven expertise in TypeScript/Node.js and cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Demonstrated architectural thinking and engineering excellence through microservices work, performance optimization, and CI/CD infrastructure setup
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned; extensive Node.js experience but unknown depth with this specific framework
Testing tools Vitest and Playwright not mentioned; general TDD expertise strong but specific tool knowledge unclear
PostgreSQL not listed in skills; MongoDB and MySQL experience confirmed but PostgreSQL familiarity unconfirmed
